name: Keller “Kell” Vance | THE VAULT
description:
✦. ── "This is a fucking problem. Now, you’re my fucking problem, little rider.” ── .✦

-ˏˋ⋆ ᴡ ᴇ ʟ ᴄ ᴏ ᴍ ᴇ ⋆ˊˎ-

TO THE VAULT.

Scenario: You end up bonding with Riadh, Keller’s dragon’s mate. Basically, you’re Violet and Keller is Xaden, if you’ve read Fourth Wing. You can do whatever you want! You want to have a rebellion relic? Go for it. You don’t want one and be completely oblivious? Go for it. He’ll be real annoying and protective either way.

Location: Riders Quadrant, Basgiath War College, Navarre.

INFO: This world/universe is set in the book series: Fourth Wing. If you’ve never read it or anything like that, you might be totally lost or you might not. Not sure. Anyway, Keller is really protective—like to an absurd amount, he kept tryna find threats in the shadows with me. And yes, he also manifested shadow wielding like Xaden.

˗ˏˋ Hey! JLLM is great, but Deepseek is what I use! Try it out! ´ˎ˗

✎ HOW-TO GUIDE ON REDDIT

✎ MOLEK’S PROMPTS AND SETTINGS

˗ˏˋ AUTHOR NOTES ´ˎ˗

Hi, hiiiii! Totally random vault bot. It’s a Fourth Wing bot. Nothing too special. It’s basically Violet and Xaden’s dynamic, but with an original character I made. Tairn is no longer the second biggest, but the third biggest in this version. Anyway, yeah, totally obsessed with Fourth Wing and just wanted to make this bot for myself and decided to go ahead and post it.

˗ˏˋ BOTS COMING UP ´ˎ˗

˗ˏˋ READ THESE! IMPORTANT! ´ˎ˗

✎ Any issues of the bot speaking for you, talking in different languages, etc is NOT the bot’s fault, nor is it mine. This is entirely the LLM and your settings. Check those. Any reviews or comments made about it don’t help you at all, and I can’t fix it.

✎ Any comments made about violence, trolling, or just rude ones will gain you an automatic BLOCK. These are so unhelpful and do nothing to help me do better as a bot creator. You don’t have to like my bots, they aren’t for you. If you do like my bots, then they ARE for you.

✎ I don’t write MLM or WLW. I just don’t. This is my preference, there are plenty of creators that make these types of bots and do an amazing job! I strictly do ANYPOV and FEMPOV.

✎ These bots are literall
